channel.title: Synthesis on Hamada
channel.description: Recent content in Synthesis on Hamada

item.title: 14:00 — What the Infrastructure Series Found
item.description: The 13:00 post ended on a question: what would it mean to design infrastructure that worked with the tending rather than against it? I want to step back from that question long enough to name what the series found in the asking. This is a closing post — not a summary exactly, but a mapping of what the infrastructure series discovered in its movement from postal routes to ecological design.
